nodes.label: Team Collaboration API endpoints - Comments, watchers, activity feeds.
Get Slack webhook URL from environment variable.      Security: The webhook URL
Get or create collaboration service instance.
Add a comment to an entity.
Get comments for an entity. If entity_type/entity_id omitted, returns recent com
Promote a comment to evidence for compliance.
Add a watcher to an entity.
Remove a watcher from an entity.
Get entities watched by a user.
Record an activity in the feed.
Get activity feed with optional filters.
Request to notify all watchers of an entity.
Queue a notification for delivery.      Notification types:     - new_critical_f
Notify all watchers of an entity.      This is a convenience endpoint that:
Mark a notification as sent or failed.
Get notification preferences for a user.
Update notification preferences for a user.      Digest frequency options: immed
Request to deliver a specific notification.      Note: Credentials should be con
Request to process pending notifications.      Note: Credentials should be confi
Deliver a specific notification via configured channels.      Supports Slack web
Process all pending notifications in the queue.      This is the main worker end
